controlling_reason: The selected physical targets do not share the same within-axis ratios as the source-authored endpoint spans. A single global transform cannot make all targets exact without forbidden local or component warping.
field_mapping_reason: Raw source evidence remains usable and approved target values now have physical-target authority, but no centimeter/world conclusion can be recovered because a single global transform cannot satisfy the selected target ratios.
